# Spark Mojo Platform — Overnight Task Queue
# Session 5 — Task & Workboard Management
# Date: March 25, 2026

## How to Use This File

Work the stories in priority order. Each story has its own branch.
For each story:
1. Create branch: `git checkout -b story/STORY-NNN-short-description`
2. Read the full story file from `../sparkmojo-internal/platform/feature-library/stories/STORY-NNN.md`
3. Read `CLAUDE.md` for project conventions
4. Build exactly what the story specifies — nothing more, ... [truncated, 4485 chars total]
build fails: frappe-react-sdk unresolved import in App.jsx. lint and python imports pass.
health.blocked resolved: frappe-react-sdk installed, build+lint pass. Restarting workflow.
build: pass, lint: pass — health verified manually after health_check hat exhausted
STORY-003: 6 files, type: doctype — SM Task core fields and lifecycle hooks in sm_widgets

STORY-003: SM Task DocType created in sm_widgets — 19 fields, controller with status_reason validation and lifecycle timestamp hooks. JSON valid, Python valid. Commit 5cda5ad on story/STORY-003-sm-task-doctype-core.

STORY-003: All local gates pass — JSON valid (19 fields, correct order/types), Python valid (controller hooks correct), scaffolding complete. bench migrate deferred to VPS. STORY-003-COMPLETE marker created.
STORY-004: 17 files (15 create, 2 modify), type: doctype
STORY-004: 5 child DocTypes created, SM Task updated with 7 new fields and 2 tracking hooks, all JSON/Python validated

STORY-004: all local gates pass — 5 child DocTypes verified (istable=1, correct fields), SM Task JSON has 7 new fields in correct order, controller hooks track_state_change and track_assignment_change implemented correctly. Remote gate (bench migrate) deferred to James.
STORY-005: 16 extended fields added to sm_task.json (SLA, source system, recurrence, execution logic). JSON valid, 42 total fields. Committed aa946b3.

STORY-005: All local gates pass. 16 extended fields verified (SLA 4, Source 7, Execution 5). 42 total fields, correct order, all fieldtypes/options/defaults match spec. JSON valid. No controller changes needed. bench migrate deferred to VPS.
STORY-006: tasks/list and tasks/get endpoints built, 8/8 tests pass, 96% coverage
STORY-006: pytest 8/8 passed, coverage 96% (modules/tasks), health endpoint OK
